0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Structured knowledge storage using a temporal knowledge graph. Stores facts, relationships, and concepts as subject-predicate-object triples with temporal metadata."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Triple Schema"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Column"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"UUIDv4"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"subject"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Entity (e.g., \"Alice\")"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"predicate"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Relationship (e.g., \"knows\")"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"object"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Target entity or value"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REAL"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.0–1.0 fact confidence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source_mem_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Originating Working Memory entry"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When fact became true"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When fact expired (NULL = current)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Record timestamp"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Example Triples"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Subject"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Predicate"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Object"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Confidence"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Alice"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"prefers_language"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Go"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.95"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Project Alpha"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"has_deadline"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2026-05-01"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.90"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Bob"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"reports_to"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Carol"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.85"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"API v2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"depends_on"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auth Service"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.80"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Validity"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Facts can expire or be superseded:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Add a fact\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-01\",\n  confidence=0.90,\n)\n\n# Update with new information (old fact auto-expires)\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-15\",\n  confidence=0.95,\n)\n\n# Query current facts only\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  current_only=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Queries"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Direct lookup\nfacts = mem.query_facts(subject=\"Alice\")\n\n# Relationship traversal\nrelated = mem.traverse(subject=\"Alice\", depth=2)\n\n# Pattern matching\nmatches = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"reports_to\",\n  object=\"Carol\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Extraction from Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne automatically extracts triples during consolidation:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  WM[Working Memory Entry] -->|NLP extraction| T[Candidate Triples]\n  T -->|confidence &gt; 0.7| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  T -->|confidence &lt; 0.7| DISCARD[Discard]\n"}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5"],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"Xtb5NrBsvEByTAkmCngao"}
4:["$","p",null,{"children":"Extraction uses a lightweight local model (no API calls) and runs during sleep cycles."}]
5:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L8",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Schema Flexibility"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory has no predefined ontology. Predicates are free-form strings. This allows dynamic knowledge domains without schema migrations."}]}]]}]]}]}]
